_comment_planetoid: Day 16: planetoid level path. If template_level_path is set, ensure_planetoid_level.py creates Planetoid_Pride from it when missing.
_comment_portal: Position [x,y,z] in cm on DemoMap for portal placeholder; place_portal_placeholder.py uses this.
_comment_poi: Day 17: POI density for create_planetoid_poi_pcg.py; optional poi_actor_blueprint_path for Actor Spawner template.
_comment_volume: Optional: PCG volume center and half-extents (cm) for setup_planetoid_pcg.py when use_landscape_bounds is false.
